description: huggingface_hub is a client for the Hugging Face Model Hub. Download / upload models, manage Spaces, etc.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/huggingface_hub && python3 huggingface_hub.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/huggingface_hub && python3 huggingface_hub.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/huggingface_hub && python3 huggingface_hub.py --help`. Client for the Hugging Face Hub.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the ai category. Fits when the engagement needs: Client for the Hugging Face Hub.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Client for the Hugging Face Hub.
